options.name: --source-input-path
options.description: Supply a directory path for input. This must contain the models for deployment as JSON files.

options.name: --source-tenant
options.description: The home tenant of the ADT to authenticate with

options.name: --source-twin-instance
options.description: The Url of the ADT Instance used for a target

options.name: --source-input-pattern
options.description: Supply a pattern for finding files within --source-input-path

options.name: --target-input-path
options.description: Supply a directory path for comparision as a Target. This must contain the models for comparions as JSON files.

options.name: --target-tenant
options.description: The home tenant of the ADT to authenticate with

options.name: --target-twin-instance
options.description: The Url of the ADT Instance used for a target

options.name: --target-input-pattern
options.description: Supply a pattern for finding files within --source-input-path

options.name: --failure-only
options.description: When set, filters results to only show failures in validation

options.name: --strict
options.description: When set, forces all warning during processing to be thrown as Exceptions

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
